themeWords.meaning: Levi; third son of Jacob; ancestor of the Levitical tribe
one who officiates in sacred rites; priest

sentenceTheme: This chapter records the genealogies of the Levites, their musical and priestly duties, and the cities allotted to them throughout Israel.

verses.text: The sons of Levi; Gershon, Kohath, and Merari.

highlightedWords.meaning: son; descendant; member of a group
Levi; third son of Jacob; ancestor of the Levitical tribe

verses.text: And the sons of Kohath; Amram, Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.

highlightedWords.meaning: son; descendant; member of a group
Kohath; a son of Levi; progenitor of the Kohathites

verses.text: And the children of Amram; Aaron, and Moses, and Miriam: the sons also of Aaron; Nadab, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.

highlightedWords.meaning: sons; children; descendants
Aaron; brother of Moses and Israel’s first high priest

verses.text: Eleazar begat Phinehas, Phinehas begat Abishua,

highlightedWords.meaning: to beget; to bring forth; to bear
Phinehas; grandson of Aaron noted for zeal

verses.text: And Abishua begat Bukki, and Bukki begat Uzzi,

highlightedWords.meaning: to beget; to bring forth; to bear
Uzzi; a priestly descendant in the line of Aaron

verses.text: And Uzzi begat Zerahiah, and Zerahiah begat Meraioth,

highlightedWords.meaning: to beget; to bring forth; to bear
Zerahiah; a descendant in the priestly lineage

verses.text: Meraioth begat Amariah, and Amariah begat Ahitub,

highlightedWords.meaning: to beget; to bring forth; to bear
Amariah; a priestly name meaning ‘Yah has promised’

verses.text: And Ahitub begat Zadok, and Zadok begat Ahimaaz,

highlightedWords.meaning: Zadok; a faithful high priest in David and Solomon’s time
to beget; to bring forth; to bear

verses.text: And Ahimaaz begat Azariah, and Azariah begat Johanan,

highlightedWords.meaning: Azariah; ‘Yah has helped’; common priestly name
to beget; to bring forth; to bear

verses.text: And Johanan begat Azariah, (he it is that executed the priest's office in the temple that Solomon built in Jerusalem:)

highlightedWords.meaning: temple; palace; large building
Jerusalem; the chief city of Israel

verses.text: And Azariah begat Amariah, and Amariah begat Ahitub,

highlightedWords.meaning: Azariah; ‘Yah has helped’; common priestly name
to beget; to bring forth; to bear

verses.text: And Ahitub begat Zadok, and Zadok begat Shallum,

highlightedWords.meaning: Zadok; a faithful high priest in David and Solomon’s time
to beget; to bring forth; to bear

verses.text: And Shallum begat Hilkiah, and Hilkiah begat Azariah,

highlightedWords.meaning: Hilkiah; a priestly name meaning ‘Yah is my portion’
to beget; to bring forth; to bear

verses.text: And Azariah begat Seraiah, and Seraiah begat Jehozadak,

highlightedWords.meaning: Seraiah; a chief priest at the time of the exile
Jehozadak; ‘Yah has justified’; father of Jeshua the high priest

verses.text: And Jehozadak went into captivity, when the LORD carried away Judah and Jerusalem by the hand of Nebuchadnezzar.

highlightedWords.meaning: the divine name; the LORD, the God of Israel
Judah; the southern kingdom; also the tribe/territory

verses.text: The sons of Levi; Gershom, Kohath, and Merari.

highlightedWords.meaning: son; descendant; member of a group
Levi; third son of Jacob; ancestor of the Levitical tribe

verses.text: And these be the names of the sons of Gershom; Libni, and Shimei.

highlightedWords.meaning: son; descendant; member of a group
Gershon (Gershom); a son of Levi; ancestor of the Gershonites

verses.text: And the sons of Kohath were; Amram, and Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.

highlightedWords.meaning: son; descendant; member of a group
Kohath; a son of Levi; progenitor of the Kohathites

verses.text: The sons of Merari; Mahli, and Mushi. And these are the families of the Levites according to their fathers.

highlightedWords.meaning: Merari; a son of Levi; ancestor of the Merarites
members of the tribe of Levi; Levitical servants/priests

verses.text: Of Gershom; Libni his son, Jahath his son, Zimmah his son,

highlightedWords.meaning: Gershon (Gershom); a son of Levi; ancestor of the Gershonites
son; descendant; member of a group

verses.text: Joah his son, Iddo his son, Zerah his son, Jeaterai his son.

highlightedWords.meaning: son; descendant; member of a group
Zerah; a personal name meaning ‘rising, dawn’

verses.text: The sons of Kohath; Amminadab his son, Korah his son, Assir his son,

highlightedWords.meaning: Kohath; a son of Levi; progenitor of the Kohathites
son; descendant; member of a group

verses.text: Elkanah his son, and Ebiasaph his son, and Assir his son,

highlightedWords.meaning: son; descendant; member of a group
Elkanah; ‘God has possessed’; a Levitical name

verses.text: Tahath his son, Uriel his son, Uzziah his son, and Shaul his son.

highlightedWords.meaning: son; descendant; member of a group
Uzziah; ‘Yah is my strength’

verses.text: And the sons of Elkanah; Amasai, and Ahimoth.

highlightedWords.meaning: sons; descendants; members of a group
Elkanah; ‘God has possessed’; a Levitical name

verses.text: As for Elkanah: the sons of Elkanah; Zophai his son, and Nahath his son,

highlightedWords.meaning: sons; descendants; members of a group
Elkanah; ‘God has possessed’; a Levitical name

verses.text: Eliab his son, Jeroham his son, Elkanah his son.

highlightedWords.meaning: son; descendant; member of a group
Elkanah; ‘God has possessed’; a Levitical name

verses.text: And the sons of Samuel; the firstborn Vashni, and Abiah.

highlightedWords.meaning: sons; descendants; members of a group
Samuel; ‘name of God’; prophet and judge

verses.text: The sons of Merari; Mahli, Libni his son, Shimei his son, Uzza his son,

highlightedWords.meaning: Merari; a son of Levi; ancestor of the Merarites
son; descendant; member of a group

verses.text: Shimea his son, Haggiah his son, Asaiah his son.

highlightedWords.meaning: son; descendant; member of a group
Asaiah; ‘Yah has made’; a Levitical name

verses.text: And these are they whom David set over the service of song in the house of the LORD, after that the ark had rest.

highlightedWords.meaning: house; temple; dwelling
the divine name; the LORD, the God of Israel

verses.text: And they ministered before the dwelling place of the tabernacle of the congregation with singing, until Solomon had built the house of the LORD in Jerusalem: and then they waited on their office according to their order.

highlightedWords.meaning: dwelling; tabernacle; sacred tent
Jerusalem; the chief city of Israel

verses.text: And these are they that waited with their children. Of the sons of the Kohathites: Heman a singer, the son of Joel, the son of Shemuel,

highlightedWords.meaning: son; descendant; member of a group
descendants of Kohath; Kohathites

verses.text: The son of Elkanah, the son of Jeroham, the son of Eliel, the son of Toah,

highlightedWords.meaning: son; descendant; member of a group
Elkanah; ‘God has possessed’; a Levitical name

verses.text: The son of Zuph, the son of Elkanah, the son of Mahath, the son of Amasai,

highlightedWords.meaning: son; descendant; member of a group
Elkanah; ‘God has possessed’; a Levitical name

verses.text: The son of Elkanah, the son of Joel, the son of Azariah, the son of Zephaniah,

highlightedWords.meaning: son; descendant; member of a group
Azariah; ‘Yah has helped’; common priestly name

verses.text: The son of Tahath, the son of Assir, the son of Ebiasaph, the son of Korah,

highlightedWords.meaning: son; descendant; member of a group
Korah; a Levite, ancestor of the Korahites

verses.text: The son of Izhar, the son of Kohath, the son of Levi, the son of Israel.

highlightedWords.meaning: Israel; the name of the patriarch Jacob and the nation
Levi; third son of Jacob; ancestor of the Levitical tribe

verses.text: And his brother Asaph, who stood on his right hand, even Asaph the son of Berachiah, the son of Shimea,

highlightedWords.meaning: Asaph; a Levitical singer and seer
right hand; south side; strength

verses.text: The son of Michael, the son of Baaseiah, the son of Malchiah,

highlightedWords.meaning: son; descendant; member of a group
Michael; ‘Who is like God?’; a personal name

verses.text: The son of Ethni, the son of Zerah, the son of Adaiah,

highlightedWords.meaning: son; descendant; member of a group
Zerah; a personal name meaning ‘rising, dawn’

verses.text: The son of Ethan, the son of Zimmah, the son of Shimei,

highlightedWords.meaning: son; descendant; member of a group
Ethan; ‘enduring’; a Levitical musician

verses.text: The son of Jahath, the son of Gershom, the son of Levi.

highlightedWords.meaning: Gershon (Gershom); a son of Levi; ancestor of the Gershonites
Levi; third son of Jacob; ancestor of the Levitical tribe

verses.text: And their brethren the sons of Merari stood on the left hand: Ethan the son of Kishi, the son of Abdi, the son of Malluch,

highlightedWords.meaning: Merari; a son of Levi; ancestor of the Merarites
left; north side

verses.text: The son of Hashabiah, the son of Amaziah, the son of Hilkiah,

highlightedWords.meaning: son; descendant; member of a group
Hilkiah; a priestly name meaning ‘Yah is my portion’

verses.text: The son of Amzi, the son of Bani, the son of Shamer,

highlightedWords.meaning: son; descendant; member of a group
Bani; a personal name, ‘built’

verses.text: The son of Mahli, the son of Mushi, the son of Merari, the son of Levi.

highlightedWords.meaning: Merari; a son of Levi; ancestor of the Merarites
Levi; third son of Jacob; ancestor of the Levitical tribe

verses.text: Their brethren also the Levites were appointed unto all manner of service of the tabernacle of the house of God.

highlightedWords.meaning: members of the tribe of Levi; Levitical servants/priests
dwelling; tabernacle; sacred tent

verses.text: But Aaron and his sons offered upon the altar of the burnt offering, and on the altar of incense, and were appointed for all the work of the place most holy, and to make an atonement for Israel, according to all that Moses the servant of God had commanded.

highlightedWords.meaning: Aaron; brother of Moses and Israel’s first high priest
atonement; expiation; propitiation

verses.text: And these are the sons of Aaron; Eleazar his son, Phinehas his son, Abishua his son,

highlightedWords.meaning: sons; descendants; members of a group
Aaron; brother of Moses and Israel’s first high priest

verses.text: Bukki his son, Uzzi his son, Zerahiah his son,

highlightedWords.meaning: son; descendant; member of a group
Uzzi; a priestly descendant in the line of Aaron

verses.text: Meraioth his son, Amariah his son, Ahitub his son,

highlightedWords.meaning: Amariah; a priestly name meaning ‘Yah has promised’
son; descendant; member of a group

verses.text: Zadok his son, Ahimaaz his son.

highlightedWords.meaning: Zadok; a faithful high priest in David and Solomon’s time
son; descendant; member of a group

verses.text: Now these are their dwelling places throughout their castles in their coasts, of the sons of Aaron, of the families of the Kohathites: for theirs was the lot.

highlightedWords.meaning: sons; descendants; members of a group
lot; allotment; portion assigned by casting lots

verses.text: And they gave them Hebron in the land of Judah, and the suburbs thereof round about it.

highlightedWords.meaning: Hebron; a city in the hill country of Judah
Judah; the southern kingdom; also the tribe/territory

verses.text: But the fields of the city, and the villages thereof, they gave to Caleb the son of Jephunneh.

highlightedWords.meaning: city; town; urban area
Caleb; a faithful Judahite spy

verses.text: And to the sons of Aaron they gave the cities of Judah, namely, Hebron, the city of refuge, and Libnah with her suburbs, and Jattir, and Eshtemoa, with their suburbs,

highlightedWords.meaning: cities; towns; urban areas
refuge; asylum; a city of refuge

verses.text: And Hilen with her suburbs, Debir with her suburbs,

highlightedWords.meaning: open land; common pasture around a city
Debir; a town in the hill country of Judah

verses.text: And Ashan with her suburbs, and Beth-shemesh with her suburbs:

highlightedWords.meaning: Ashan; a town in the lowlands of Judah/Simeon
open land; common pasture around a city

verses.text: And out of the tribe of Benjamin; Geba with her suburbs, and Alemeth with her suburbs, and Anathoth with her suburbs. All their cities throughout their families were thirteen cities.

highlightedWords.meaning: Benjamin; youngest son of Jacob; the tribe/territory
cities; towns; urban areas

verses.text: And unto the sons of Kohath, which were left of the family of that tribe, were cities given out of the half tribe, namely, out of the half tribe of Manasseh, by lot, ten cities.

highlightedWords.meaning: Kohath; a son of Levi; progenitor of the Kohathites
lot; allotment; portion assigned by casting lots

verses.text: And to the sons of Gershom throughout their families out of the tribe of Issachar, and out of the tribe of Asher, and out of the tribe of Naphtali, and out of the tribe of Manasseh in Bashan, thirteen cities.

highlightedWords.meaning: Gershon (Gershom); a son of Levi; ancestor of the Gershonites
Manasseh; Joseph’s firstborn; tribe/territory

verses.text: Unto the sons of Merari were given by lot, throughout their families, out of the tribe of Reuben, and out of the tribe of Gad, and out of the tribe of Zebulun, twelve cities.

highlightedWords.meaning: Merari; a son of Levi; ancestor of the Merarites
lot; allotment; portion assigned by casting lots

verses.text: And the children of Israel gave to the Levites these cities with their suburbs.

highlightedWords.meaning: Israel; the name of the patriarch Jacob and the nation
members of the tribe of Levi; Levitical servants/priests

verses.text: And they gave by lot out of the tribe of the children of Judah, and out of the tribe of the children of Simeon, and out of the tribe of the children of Benjamin, these cities, which are called by their names.

highlightedWords.meaning: Judah; the southern kingdom; also the tribe/territory
Benjamin; youngest son of Jacob; the tribe/territory

verses.text: And the residue of the families of the sons of Kohath had cities of their coasts out of the tribe of Ephraim.

highlightedWords.meaning: Kohath; a son of Levi; progenitor of the Kohathites
Ephraim; Joseph’s second son; tribe/territory

verses.text: And they gave unto them, of the cities of refuge, Shechem in mount Ephraim with her suburbs; they gave also Gezer with her suburbs,

highlightedWords.meaning: refuge; asylum; a city of refuge
Shechem; a city in the hill-country of Ephraim

verses.text: And Jokmeam with her suburbs, and Beth-horon with her suburbs,

highlightedWords.meaning: Jokmeam; a city in Ephraim
Beth-horon; upper/lower towns on the border of Ephraim and Benjamin

verses.text: And Aijalon with her suburbs, and Gath-rimmon with her suburbs:

highlightedWords.meaning: Aijalon; a town in the territory of Dan/Ephraim
open land; common pasture around a city

verses.text: And out of the half tribe of Manasseh; Aner with her suburbs, and Bileam with her suburbs, for the family of the remnant of the sons of Kohath.

highlightedWords.meaning: Manasseh; Joseph’s firstborn; tribe/territory
Kohath; a son of Levi; progenitor of the Kohathites

verses.text: Unto the sons of Gershom were given out of the family of the half tribe of Manasseh, Golan in Bashan with her suburbs, and Ashtaroth with her suburbs:

highlightedWords.meaning: Gershon (Gershom); a son of Levi; ancestor of the Gershonites
Bashan; a region east of the Jordan

verses.text: And out of the tribe of Issachar; Kedesh with her suburbs, Daberath with her suburbs,

highlightedWords.meaning: Issachar; a son of Jacob; tribe/territory
Kedesh; ‘holy’; a Levitical city

verses.text: And Ramoth with her suburbs, and Anem with her suburbs:

highlightedWords.meaning: Ramoth; ‘heights’; a Levitical city
open land; common pasture around a city

verses.text: And out of the tribe of Asher; Mashal with her suburbs, and Abdon with her suburbs,

highlightedWords.meaning: Asher; a son of Jacob; tribe/territory
Abdon; a city in Asher; also a personal name

verses.text: And Hukok with her suburbs, and Rehob with her suburbs:

highlightedWords.meaning: Rehob; a city name meaning ‘broad place’
open land; common pasture around a city

verses.text: And out of the tribe of Naphtali; Kedesh in Galilee with her suburbs, and Hammon with her suburbs, and Kirjathaim with her suburbs.

highlightedWords.meaning: Naphtali; a son of Jacob; tribe/territory
Galilee; a region in northern Israel

verses.text: Unto the rest of the children of Merari were given out of the tribe of Zebulun, Rimmon with her suburbs, Tabor with her suburbs:

highlightedWords.meaning: Zebulun; a son of Jacob; tribe/territory
Rimmon; a town name; also the name of a deity (context: town)

verses.text: And on the other side Jordan by Jericho, on the east side of Jordan, were given them out of the tribe of Reuben, Bezer in the wilderness with her suburbs, and Jahzah with her suburbs,

highlightedWords.meaning: Jordan; the main river of Palestine
Reuben; Jacob’s firstborn; tribe/territory

verses.text: Kedemoth also with her suburbs, and Mephaath with her suburbs:

highlightedWords.meaning: Kedemoth; a Levitical city in Reuben
Mephaath; a Levitical city in Reuben

verses.text: And out of the tribe of Gad; Ramoth in Gilead with her suburbs, and Mahanaim with her suburbs,

highlightedWords.meaning: Gad; a son of Jacob; tribe/territory
Gilead; a region east of the Jordan

verses.text: And Heshbon with her suburbs, and Jazer with her suburbs.

highlightedWords.meaning: Heshbon; a city east of the Jordan
Jazer; a city in Gilead
